summaryForNext: 9 changes ordered into 4 execution rounds; Round 1 (parallel, no deps) is c001 REST-RLS, c002 Kiln signatures, c004 realtime default, c005 auth hardening. First change to apply: p16-c001-rest-rls-enforcement (highest severity, tenant isolation). Trade-off surfaced: P0-only (c001-c004, ~2-3wk) is the honest minimum v1.0 bar if full 4-6wk scope isn't feasible; c008 needs a human operator for credentials/backup drills.
